MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing required". Therefore, the Court denied Counsel Shawn S. Salehieh and Presidio Law Group's MOTION
FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFFS DONNA TAM, KEN TAM and DANH YAO. (301/JLW/JU) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
